title: Flashback QOL Pack
description: A modpack that uses the fabric mod loader and includes flashback and quality of life mods for the best flashback recordings.
body:
## **Flashback QOL Pack**
**High-performance recording and VR, built by a creator for creators.**

I built the **Flashback QOL Pack** because I wanted a lightweight, snappy experience that didn't struggle when trying to record high-quality footage. It’s an independent project focused on one thing: making sure your recording tools—especially **Flashback**—work perfectly without tanking your FPS.

Since I'm an independent developer, I’ve hand-picked these mods to create a "daily driver" pack that’s as good for serious building as it is for cinematic VR content.

### **✨ Why I built this pack**
*   **Smooth Replays:** Integrated **Flashback** so you can capture every moment without the lag of traditional recording.
*   **VR That Feels Real:** By including **Vivecraft**, you get full arm and head movement tracking. When you watch your replays, you actually look like a person moving around, not a stiff statue.
*   **Maximum Frames:** Using the "big three" of optimization—**Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **FerriteCore**—to keep things running smoothly even on modest hardware.
*   **The Little Details:** Included things like **3D Skin Layers** and **Falling Leaves** to make the world feel more alive while you're exploring or filming.

### **🛠️ Personal Picks & Optimization**
*   **Fast Transitions:** Added **Remove Reloading Screen** and **FastQuit** because no one likes staring at a "Saving World" bar for ten seconds.
*   **Smart Rendering:** **ImmediatelyFast** and **Entity Culling** keep your frames high in busy areas with lots of mobs or chests.
*   **Safety First:** **Crash Assistant** is included so if something does go wrong, you can get a log and fix it fast.
